.github/workflows/build.yaml.general_idea: Configure the CI workflow to use JDK 21 instead of the previous version.

src/main/java/de/muenchen/rbs/kitafinder.general_idea: Replace javax.validation imports with jakarta.validation imports to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace changes required by Spring Boot 3 and Java 21.
src/main/java/de/muenchen/rbs/kitafinder.why_exists: javax.validation classes are removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.validation does not exist' on Spring Boot 3/JDK 21.
